modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble uninstalling a program on my Windows computer

full_description_text:  
- So, I was trying to get rid of this program I don’t need anymore.  
- I went to the control panel and clicked on uninstall, but it just wouldn’t go away.  
- It’s kinda annoying because I thought it would be easy, but now it’s just sitting there taking up space.
short_description: Trouble uninstalling a program on my Windows computer
